flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 25% at Rosemont College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (466 vs 623).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Rosemont College rose 21% between 2006 and 2009 ($21.7k → $26.2k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 19 pp at Rosemont College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (43.5% vs 62.1%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Rosemont College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($20.8k → $23.8k).
